mapper.select: SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, s.name AS subjectName, c.name AS classroomName, t1.cnt AS studentCount FROM lecture l INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON ta.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN classroom c ON c.classroom_id = l.classroom_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, l.lecture_id FROM lecture l INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id GROUP BY l.lecture_id ) t1 ON l.lecture_id = t1.lecture_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND CURDATE() BETWEEN l.start_date AND l.end_date

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM lecture WHERE end_date > CURDATE()) l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id WHERE se.lecture_id IN ( SELECT lecture_id FROM teacher_assignment WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} )
AND (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT u.name AS studentName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, s.name AS subjectName, v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, va.location AS vehicleLocation, u.address FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON l.lecture_id = va.lecture_id INNER JOIN vehicle v ON va.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id WHERE se.lecture_id IN ( SELECT lecture_id FROM teacher_assignment WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} ) AND l.day_of_week = CASE DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%w') WHEN '0' THEN '일' WHEN '1' THEN '월' WHEN '2' THEN '화' WHEN '3' THEN '수' WHEN '4' THEN '목' WHEN '5' THEN '금' WHEN '6' THEN '토' END

SELECT u.user_id AS teacherId, u.name, u.phone, u.address, u.birth, th.last_education AS lastEducation, th.personal_history AS personalHistory FROM user u INNER JOIN teacher_history th ON u.user_id = th.teacher_id WHERE u.user_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT m.material_title AS materialTitle, m.total_count AS totalCount, m.used_count AS usedCount, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek FROM material m INNER JOIN lecture l ON m.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON ta.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE title LIKE '%강사%'
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album
WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
